sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, haystack String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World'), (2, 'ClickHouse Database'), (3, 'Fuzz Testing SQL');
SELECT id, multiSearchFirstPosition(haystack, ['llo', 'Wor', 'zz']) AS position FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET haystack = 'Fuzz Testing ClickHouse' WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, multiSearchFirstPosition(haystack, ['Click', 'House']) AS position FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
